title: crate-sieve-form-2r1
description: Keep, FileInto, Discard, and Reject(String) have no doc comments. Redirect is the only variant with one. Reject in particular needs: what the String contains (human-readable rejection reason), that it requires require ["reject"] (RFC 5429 §2.1), and what the MTA is expected to do with it. Callers matching on SieveAction need this information.
